description_long: This object depicts an adult person suspended in a hang glider, with their body harnessed securely beneath a large, V-shaped wing. The individual is wearing a fitted suit and helmet, suggesting a focus on safety and aerodynamics. The wings are sleek and elongated, extending far to either side, and appear to be constructed from a lightweight, rigid material. The harness system is visible, attaching the person to the glider and supporting their weight in a streamlined, upright posture. The person's arms are positioned close to their body, and their legs are slightly apart, indicating a stable flying position. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for recreational or sport hang gliding in urban or park environments.
description: An adult in a fitted suit and helmet is suspended beneath a large, sleek hang glider with extended V-shaped wings. The harness system secures the person in a stable, upright flying posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person's face, helmet, and the full span of the V-shaped glider wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the person, the harness, and the thickness of the glider wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the helmet, suit, and the symmetrical extension of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the person and the glider's wing structure.
attribute_clothing_type: aerodynamic flight suit with a safety harness and helmet
attribute_posture: suspended upright in a hang gliding position
